calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff EVA LOPEZ in propria persona and opposing party (Her son ROGER also in court)

Ms. Lopez did not give notice to the opposition re intent to argue. Furthermore, no written opposition was filed to the demurrer. Tentative ruling adopted -- sustained with 10 days leave to amend -- no opposition filed. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
